scripts.build:chrome: pnpm clean:chrome && cross-env TARGET=chrome OUTPUT_DIR=dist/chrome rolldown -c && node scripts/copy-static.js dist/chrome && node scripts/build-chrome-manifest.js
scripts.build:firefox: pnpm clean:firefox && cross-env TARGET=firefox OUTPUT_DIR=dist/firefox rolldown -c && node scripts/copy-static.js dist/firefox && node scripts/build-firefox-manifest.js
scripts.release:chrome:nightly: pnpm clean:chrome && cross-env TARGET=chrome OUTPUT_DIR=dist/chrome NIGHTLY=true rolldown -c && node scripts/copy-static.js dist/chrome && node scripts/build-chrome-manifest.js && node scripts/package.js chrome-nightly
scripts.release:firefox: pnpm build:firefox && pnpm sign:firefox && node scripts/package.js firefox
scripts.release: pnpm build && pnpm sign:firefox && node scripts/package.js all
